salary_adjustments.description: Percentage increase in minimum and maximum of salary scales
Adjustment of scale maxima for scales I, J, and K

variable_salary.description: Applicable to commercial field staff, inside sales, treasury, and asset management

compensation_regulations.description: For employees who could realize more than 20% variable salary before 2015
compensation_regulations.calculation: Difference between old and new maximum multiplied by 0.32

labor_market_allowance.description: Temporary allowance for specialist functions due to labor market shortages
conditions: Function-bound and can be adjusted or stopped based on benchmarking every 2-3 years

holiday_allowance.description: 8% of annual salary, paid monthly as part of the choice budget

end_of_year_bonus.description: 8.33% of annual salary, paid monthly as part of the choice budget

profit_sharing.description: Maximum 3.3% of 12 times the gross monthly salary, based on company results

extended_business_hours.description: Working outside standard business hours (Mon-Fri 19:00-22:00, Sat 9:00-17:00)

overtime_allowances.description: For employees in function groups A to H

allowances.time: Sundays, public holidays, and specific dates/times

standby_allowance.description: For being available outside agreed working hours
standby_allowance.annual_adjustment: Adjusted on January 1st with the previous year's CAO increase

eurocross_inconvenience_allowance.description: For Eurocross employees working specific hours

overtime_percentages.condition: Up to 8 hours per day or 40 hours per week
Above 8 hours per day or 40 hours per week, Mon-Fri 07:00-23:00

it_monitoring_control_center_shift_allow.description: For IT Monitoring and Control Center employees working 7x24 hour shifts

vacation_days.description: Statutory vacation hours are four times the individual weekly working hours
vacation_days.example: 34-hour workweek results in 136 hours of vacation

additional_vacation_purchase.description: Up to 10% of individual annual working hours can be purchased from the choice budget

bereavement.description: Additional days can be agreed upon with the supervisor

diversity_day.description: 1 day per calendar year for activities related to diversity policy
diversity_day.application: Must be requested at least 1 month in advance

social_leave.description: For unpaid activities improving social cohesion
social_leave.payment: 50% of working time, salary paid during leave

adoption_and_foster_care_leave.payment: Full salary during leave, can be extended to 8 weeks under certain conditions

short_term_care_leave.payment: 90% of gross salary, at least minimum wage

long_term_care_leave.payment: 50% of the number of leave hours taken, up to a maximum of 1 month's salary per calendar year

short_term.description: For urgent care needs, up to twice the average weekly working hours within a 12-month period

long_term.description: For prolonged care needs, up to 13 times the weekly working hours per calendar year
long_term.payment: 50% of the leave hours taken, up to a maximum of 1 month's salary per calendar year

pension_leave.description: Unpaid leave before retirement, can be full or partial

partial.pension: Accrual over hours with salary, first 6 months for leave hours

components.duration: Once the weekly individual working hours within 4 weeks after birth
Five times the weekly individual working hours within 6 months after birth

sabbatical_leave.description: Unpaid leave for 2 to 6 months, once every 5 years
conditions: Minimum 5 years of continuous service at Achmea
Pension accrual continues based on pre-leave pension basis
sabbatical_leave.application: Must be requested 6 months in advance

senior_leave.description: For former Agis employees, starting at age 55
conditions: Employed by a healthcare insurer before June 1, 2007
Employed by Agis Zorgverzekeringen on December 31, 2009
Minimum 7 years of service at Achmea or its predecessor

pensionable_salary.description: 12 times the monthly salary plus holiday allowance and end-of-year bonus, including variable elements like overtime and inconvenience allowances

franchise.adjustment: Annually adjusted with general CAO increases

old_age_pension.description: Lifelong from the first day of the month in which the employee turns 68
old_age_pension.accrual_rate: Determined annually by SPA based on collective premium

partner_pension.description: Lifelong, starting from the first day of the month of death, maximum 70% of the fictitious old-age pension

orphan_pension.description: Maximum 14% of the fictitious old-age pension, up to age 18 (or 27 for students)

indexation.description: Annual decision by SPA on increasing pension rights and entitlements, up to the Consumer Price Index (CPI)

partial_retirement.description: From age 55, in full days per week, maximum 2 changes in the number of days

pension_exchange.description: Possibility to exchange old-age pension for higher partner pension or vice versa

net_pension_scheme.description: Voluntary participation from January 1, 2015, for employees with a pensionable salary above the franchise
net_pension_scheme.contribution: Maximum equal to the net individual pension budget

life_course_contribution.description: Replaced by a personal allowance from January 1, 2014

far_contribution.description: Replaced by a personal allowance from January 1, 2014

accrual_percentage.description: Personal allowance for employees with a 2.25% accrual rate as of January 1, 2014

flexible_pension.description: Personal allowance from January 1, 2014, instead of annual deposit

reduced_franchise.description: Personal allowance from January 1, 2014, for former Sterpolis employees

vut_scheme.description: For former Agis employees born before 1950 or already using the VUT scheme on January 1, 2010

waiting_period_regulation.description: Continues for former Agis employees with adjustments from January 1, 2015

overtime_rules.description: Overtime is working more hours than the individual working hours or on company-closed days by order of the supervisor
overtime_rules.maximum_hours: 9 hours per week, not more than 5% of individual working hours in 6 months

function_groups_A_to_H.time: Can be compensated in time or money, with approval from supervisor

function_groups_I_and_above.time: Compensated in time with supervisor's approval, no overtime allowance

min_max_contract.description: Agreement on average minimum and maximum hours per week, difference no more than 6 hours

achmea_select.description: Annual choice to work more or fewer hours

ranges.24_to_34_hours: Max 2 hours less or 4 hours more
ranges.24_hours_or_less: Max 1 hour less or 2 hours more

standby_duty.description: Being available to work outside agreed working hours

working_hours_adjustment.description: Possibility to adjust working hours in the employment contract, subject to the Flexible Working Act

dates_of_changes.change: Salary adjustments, new minimum hourly wage, and one-time payment
New travel expense reimbursement rules for commuting
Annual choice round for Achmea Select
Further salary adjustments and new minimum hourly wage

unlimited_education_budget.description: All You Can Learn, no approval from supervisor needed, broad training catalog

climate_budget.description: €2,500 net for full-time employees to spend on sustainability and climate improvement products/services
conditions: Must be in service between December 1, 2023, and August 31, 2025
Must be in service for more than 1 year
Budget must be used within 1 year of receipt

redundancy_budget.description: €2,000 for outplacement for employees who become redundant

early_retirement_scheme.description: Regeling Vervroegde Uittreding (RVU), available until December 31, 2025
conditions: Minimum 10 years of service at Achmea
Earliest 36 months before reaching AOW age
Written resignation at least 4 months before the start of RVU

former_agis_employees.senior_leave: From age 55, 6% reduction in working hours annually
former_agis_employees.vut_scheme: For employees born before 1950 or already using the scheme on January 1, 2010

former_rs_a_employees.senior_reduction: Retention of right to reduce working hours before January 1, 2009

former_avcb_employees.end_of_year_bonus: Retention of higher end-of-year bonus if applicable on December 31, 1998
former_avcb_employees.aow_compensation: Retention of AOW compensation if applicable on December 31, 1999

former_levob_employees.senior_reduction: Retention of right to reduce working hours before January 1, 2010 if aged 59 or older
former_levob_employees.mortgage_regulations: Retention of personnel mortgage conditions for existing mortgages

former_axa_employees.senior_reduction: Retention of right to reduce working hours before January 1, 2010 if aged 59 or older
former_axa_employees.mortgage_regulations: Retention of personnel mortgage conditions for existing mortgages
